transcription.summary:
## Call Summary

Tyler from Direct Automotive called looking for a blower motor resistor for a 2018 Chevy Equinox (VIN KS700039). The resistor is integrated into the blower motor. One in stock at $409.50 cost / $585 list. Part number 68214892AD, quote 60853.

**Action Items:**
- Tyler to quote customer and call back to order.
